_comment_save_server: Must match save_server's own host/port/internal_api_key — used to verify clients' online-issued licenses via the internal VERIFY_ACTIVATION command.
_comment_active_map: REQUIRED: Set this to the map ID you want to host (e.g., 'awakening_cave'). Must match a .tmx file in maps_dir.
_comment_dashboard: Admin dashboard (HTTP) — set admin_password to enable. Access at http://<server-ip>:8888/
